statement: SFIA 9 (published 30 October 2024) is the current version of the Skills Framework for the Information Age, expanding to 147 skills and refreshing cyber/AI/data competencies.

evidence.quote: SFIA 9 ... published in October 2024 ... expanding the total number of skills from 121 to 147

falsifier: sfia-online.org announcing SFIA 10 as current would falsify this.
